Package com.shaft.mcp

package com.shaft.mcp
  • Class
    Description
    AutobotCodeBlock
    Structured code block returned by a cloud provider codegen response.
    AutobotLocalAgentClient
    MCP-visible local agent client descriptor.
    AutobotProviderChatResponse
    Safe cloud provider chat response returned by SHAFT Autobot MCP.
    AutobotProviderStatus
    Read-only readiness snapshot for the configured SHAFT cloud provider.
    AutobotService
    MCP adapter for SHAFT Autobot local agent routing.
    BrowserService
     
    BrowserType
    Supported browser types for SHAFT WebDriver initialization.
    CaptureService
    MCP adapter for deterministic managed-browser SHAFT Capture recording.
    CaptureService.CaptureBackendBlocks
    Code-block summary for one generated backend.
    CaptureService.CaptureBackendComparisonResult
    Backend comparison result.
    CaptureService.CaptureCodegenStartRequest
    Structured request fields for the Playwright-codegen-compatible MCP start tool.
    CaptureService.McpLocatorCandidate
    One locator candidate observed for a picked element.
    CaptureService.McpPickLocatorResult
    Pick-locator result.
    CaptureService.McpRankedLocatorCandidate
    One ranked locator candidate.
    CodingPartnerService
    MCP planning tools for a repository-aware SHAFT IntelliJ coding partner.
    DoctorService
    MCP adapter for deterministic SHAFT Doctor analysis with optional configured provider advisory.
    ElementService
    MCP-safe element actions.
    EngineService
     
    GuideService
    Searches the live official SHAFT user guide for MCP agents before they write SHAFT code.
    HealerService
    MCP healer loop for guarded SHAFT/Selenium reruns and review-only repair suggestions.
    locatorStrategy
    Locator strategies for finding elements on a web page.
    McpAccessibilityAuditResult
    Non-asserting axe-core accessibility audit result returned by browser_accessibility_audit.
    McpAccessibilityViolation
    A single axe-core rule violation, returned by browser_accessibility_audit.
    McpAccessibilityViolationNode
    A single DOM node implicated in an accessibility violation, returned by browser_accessibility_audit.
    McpActionRecord
    Actionable remediation item returned by MCP analysis.
    McpActionRecord.Status
    Action status.
    McpAnalysisReport
    Local-stdio MCP report for failed Allure analysis and remediation snippets.
    McpAnalysisReport.Status
    Report status.
    McpAndroidEmulatorProposal
    User-confirmable Android emulator provisioning proposal.
    McpAppiumLocatorSuggester
    Selects Appium locators from the current Inspector source using Appium Inspector's locator order.
    McpAppiumLocatorSuggester.LocatorSuggestion
     
    McpCaptureReplayResult
    MCP result for Capture generation, replay, and reusable code snippets.
    McpCodeBlock
    Safe copy-paste code block returned by local MCP remediation tools.
    McpCodeBlock.Kind
    Code block type.
    McpCodeGuardrailResult
    Result of checking generated or agent-authored code against SHAFT MCP guardrails.
    McpCodeGuardrailViolation
    Code guardrail finding returned to MCP clients.
    McpCodingPartnerDiff
    Preview-only unified diff that inserts reviewed SHAFT code into an existing Java target.
    McpCodingPartnerNextAction
    Structured follow-up MCP action for a preview-only coding partner plan.
    McpCodingPartnerPlan
    Preview-only coding partner plan for IntelliJ and MCP clients.
    McpCodingPartnerStep
    Single deterministic step in a preview-only coding partner plan.
    McpEvidencePack
    Manifest of local evidence files reviewers should inspect for Capture codegen changes.
    McpGuideMatch
    One official SHAFT user-guide match returned by shaft_guide_search.
    McpGuideSearchResult
    Official SHAFT user-guide search result for MCP agents.
    McpHealerAttemptResult
    One guarded rerun attempt made by the MCP healer.
    McpHealerRunResult
    MCP healer result for guarded Selenium/SHAFT test reruns and review-only fixes.
    McpHealerRunResult.Status
    Overall healer status.
    McpMobileAccessibilityTree
    Mobile accessibility tree or current Appium page source returned for MCP inspection.
    McpMobileActionResult
    Mobile action result returned by MCP mobile tools.
    McpMobileContextSnapshot
    Current Appium context state for native, hybrid, or mobile web sessions.
    McpMobileDevice
    Mobile device discovered by local platform tooling.
    McpMobileInspectorPlan
    Confirmation-ready plan for a wrapped Appium Inspector recording session.
    McpMobileInspectorRecordingStatus
    Runtime status for a wrapped Appium Inspector recording session.
    McpMobileNaturalActionResult
    Mobile natural action result returned by mobile_natural_act tool.
    McpMobileRecordedAction
    Persisted MCP mobile action for deterministic replay generation.
    McpMobileRecording
    Persisted MCP mobile action recording.
    McpMobileRecordingStatus
    Status for MCP mobile action recording.
    McpMobileReplayResult
    Result for MCP mobile recording code generation or replay.
    McpMobileSessionResult
    Mobile session setup result returned by MCP mobile tools.
    McpMobileStepSummary
    Summary of one recorded mobile step, surfaced in McpMobileRecordingStatus so an agent can target McpMobileRecordingService.deleteStep(String) or McpMobileRecordingService.reorderStep(String, String) by stable stepId without re-reading the persisted recording file.
    McpMobileToolchainDiagnostic
    Diagnostic details for one local mobile toolchain dependency.
    McpMobileToolchainStatus
    Local mobile toolchain discovery status.
    McpNaturalActionResult
    Result metadata returned after a trust-gated natural action.
    McpNetworkTransaction
    One observed network transaction summary returned by browser_network_requests, without headers or bodies.
    McpNetworkTransactionDetail
    One observed network transaction's detail returned by browser_network_request, including headers and a truncated, redacted response body preview as recorded by trace capture.
    McpNetworkTransactionList
    Network transaction listing returned by browser_network_requests.
    McpPageDomSnapshot
    Browser DOM snapshot returned by the MCP browser inspection tools.
    McpProviderFallback
    Safe provider metadata for optional AI fallback.
    McpScenarioCatalogResult
    Scenario catalog response returned to MCP clients.
    McpScreenshotResult
    Browser screenshot payload returned by the MCP browser inspection tools.
    McpShaftProjectGenerationResult
    Result returned after generating a SHAFT project through MCP.
    McpShaftProjectInitAgentsResult
    Result returned after scaffolding SHAFT agent/skill definitions into a user's test repo.
    McpShaftProjectUpgradeResult
    Result returned after invoking the SHAFT modular project upgrader through MCP.
    McpTestAutomationScenario
    Test automation use case returned by the MCP scenario catalog.
    McpTestPlanExploreResult
    Result of a test_plan_explore breadth-first crawl: how many pages were visited, the workspace-relative Markdown test-plan files written into specs/, and any bounded-crawl or fail-soft warnings raised along the way.
    McpVerificationResult
    Result of a guarded, focused Maven verification command.
    MobileApiCaptureStatus
    Safe status of a mobile API capture session -- no bodies, no raw headers, nothing sensitive.
    MobileService
    MCP tools for mobile web emulation, Appium native sessions, and SHAFT touch actions.
    NaturalActionService
    MCP entry point for trust-gated SHAFT natural-language actions.
    PlannerService
    MCP planner: crawls the active SHAFT browser session breadth-first and writes deterministic, review-first Markdown test plans per discovered flow.
    PlaywrightService
    MCP-safe Playwright tools backed by SHAFT.GUI.Playwright.
    ShaftMcpApplication
     
    ShaftProjectService
    MCP project lifecycle tools backed by existing SHAFT generator assets and upgrader scripts.
    TestAutomationService
    MCP tools that describe SHAFT test-automation agent workflows and validate generated code guardrails.
    TraceService
    MCP tools for persisted SHAFT trace discovery, reading, and deterministic failure analysis.
    TraceService.McpMergeShardsResult
    Merged-shard report result.
    TraceService.McpTraceActionSummary
    Failed action summary from a SHAFT trace.
    TraceService.McpTraceIndexRecord
    One persisted SHAFT trace index.
    TraceService.McpTraceLatestResult
    Recent trace index listing result.
    TraceService.McpTraceReadResult
    Bounded trace JSON read result.
    TraceService.McpTraceSummary
    Deterministic SHAFT trace summary.
    TraceService.McpTraceViewerResult
    Resolved offline SHAFT Trace Report HTML viewer path.
